flows: api_manager -> main — message=la funzione request restituisce un stringa in formato json, con un campo status;
main calls gettoken() to get a token.
main sends a request to api_manager with the token, if the token is not null.
localuser requests data from the user.
localuser creates a new localuser object.
the diagram models a login process involving a main component, a localuser component, and an api manager.
the process starts with the main component retrieving a token.
the token is used to request user data from the api manager.
the api manager returns a status, which is then handled by the main component.
the diagram shows a simple sequence of messages and a conditional check on the token.
api_manager -> service/need/report — message=[for each entry in listjson]; new; displaylist();
main sends a listjson request to the api_manager.
the api_manager iterates through the listjson and calls the displaylist() method on the service/need/report object for each entry.
the diagram models the interaction between a main application and an api manager to display a list of service/need/report entries.
the api manager iterates through a list of json data and calls a displaylist method on a service/need/report object for each item.
main sends a 'new' message to api_manager.
api_manager calls the 'newentry' method on service/need/report, passing 'request(newentry)' as an argument.
service/need/report returns a 'done' message to api_manager.
the diagram models the process of submitting a new entry to a system.
the main actor initiates the process by sending a 'new' message to the api manager.
the api manager then delegates the actual entry creation to the service/need/report component.
the service/need/report component handles the creation and returns a confirmation ('done') to the api manager.
main -> api_manager: stampa dai a schermo;
api_manager -> main: [for each dato in datiaggiornati] set(dato);
main calls stampa dai a schermo.
for each dato in datiaggiornati, api_manager calls set(dato).
the diagram models a process where data is read, transformed (likely to json), and sent to a service or report generation component.
the loop suggests that multiple data items need to be processed.
the "done" messages indicate successful completion of each step.
